claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Read-only audit found that scripts/verify-codex-live-preflight.mjs is a useful real-vault evidence gate but does not prove real Codex desktop dispatch. The accepted source fields are emitted by the hook itself and can also be produced by installer/diagnostic/manual synthetic wrapper invocations. Additional gaps include missing submitted/completed correlation because submitted events lack task_id, fallback to unrelated completed events, no parent-process or challenge attestation, no proof that injected context reached the model, and loose hook registration checks.
